# Chapter 4: Machine design under fatigue and wear  (~140 pp)
- 4.1 Fatigue revisited at design depth (20) · 4.2 S-N curves, design factors, safe-life vs damage-tolerant (20) · 4.3 Fracture mechanics for design (20) · 4.4 Wear-driven design margins (15) · 4.5 Reliability-based design (18) · 4.6 Service-life prediction (15) · 4.7 Worked example: aircraft component, automotive component, infrastructure component (20) · 4.8 Failure section: design factors that were too low or too high; Comet, Aloha, fatigue inspections (12)

**Archetype**: failure, optimisation. **Project**: design a small cyclic-loaded part for $10^6$ cycles; verify with rig test. **Exercises**: 40.
